title: Peripatos Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Peripatos — convert academic papers to Socratic-dialogue podcasts.

base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (Requesty, OpenRouter, or vanilla OpenAI).

api_key.description: API key for the LLM provider.

provider.description: TTS backend. 'edge' uses Microsoft Edge TTS (free, no API key). 'openai_compatible' uses any OpenAI-compatible TTS endpoint.

base_url.description: Base URL for openai_compatible TTS provider. Required when provider is 'openai_compatible'.

api_key.description: API key for openai_compatible TTS provider.

voice.description: Deprecated: single voice for both speakers. Use 'voices.host' and 'voices.interviewee' instead.

model.description: Model identifier for openai_compatible TTS provider.

output_dir.description: Default output directory for generated MP3 files.

language.description: Dialogue language. 'en' for English, 'zh-CN' for Mandarin Chinese with English technical terms.

rag.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation configuration for the vector store.

provider.description: Embedding backend. 'openai_compatible' for API-based embeddings, 'local' for sentence-transformers models.

embedding_model.description: Model name. For local: HuggingFace path (e.g., 'BAAI/bge-m3'). For remote: API model identifier.

chunk_size.description: Size of text chunks for indexing (characters).

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve for each search query.

cache_dir.description: Directory to store FAISS indices. Defaults to '~/.cache/peripatos/rag/'.
